projectDescription: An Express.js backend service that wraps the Buda.com exchange API to create and verify Bitcoin Lightning Network invoices and expose LNURL-pay / Lightning Address endpoints.
keyFeatures: Create Bitcoin Lightning Network BOLT11 invoices via Buda.com exchange
Verify invoice payment status by checking confirmed BTC deposits
LNURL-pay / Lightning Address protocol support (LUD-06, LUD-09)
Server-side HMAC-SHA384 authentication — API credentials never exposed to clients
Input validation via express-validator with structured error responses
One-command deployment to Fly.io with included Dockerfile and fly.toml
Full test suite with Jest and Supertest (unit + integration)
publicApiSurface: POST /newinvoice — create a Lightning invoice (amount in satoshis, msg)
POST /status — check if an invoice has been paid and confirmed
GET /.well-known/lnurlp/:username — LNURL-pay metadata for Lightning Address
GET /callback?amount=<msats>&comment=<text> — LNURL-pay callback returning a BOLT11 invoice
